languages.text: "Каис-торр-Шайга балансирует на грани объявления херетеком. Я также натыкался на упоминания его связей с {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Хладным торгом{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}миссией Касбаллики{/g}. Однако он никогда не пересекал грань дозволенного — ну или не попадался на этом".

traits.locale_text: "Каис-торр-Шайга балансирует на грани объявления малатеком. Я также натыкался на упоминания его связей с {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Хладным торгом{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}миссией Касбаллики{/g}. Однако он никогда не пересекал грань дозволенного — ну или не попадался на этом".

languages.text: "Kais-torr-Shaiga is teetering on the brink of being declared a heretek. I've also come across references to his ties to the {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Cold Trade{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Kasballica Mission{/g}. However, he has never crossed the line — or, at least, he's never been caught."
languages.original_text: "Каис-торр-Шайга балансирует на грани объявления херетеком. Я также натыкался на упоминания его связей с {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Хладным торгом{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}миссией Касбаллики{/g}. Однако он никогда не пересекал грань дозволенного — ну или не попадался на этом".

traits.locale_text: "Kais-torr-Shaiga is teetering on the brink of being declared a heretek. I've also come across references to his ties to the {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Cold Trade{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Kasballica Mission{/g}. However, he has never crossed the line — or, at least, he's never been caught."

"Kais-torr-Shaiga is teetering on the brink of being declared a malatek. I've also come across references to his ties to the Cold Trade and the Kasballica Mission. However, he has never crossed the line — or, at least, he's never been caught."

"Kais-torr-Shaiga is teetering on the brink of being declared a malatek. I've also come across references to his ties to the Cold Trade and the Kasballica Mission. However, he has never crossed the line — or, at least, he's never been caught."

"Kais-torr-Shaiga is teetering on the brink of being declared a heretek. I've also come across references to his ties to the {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Cold Trade{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Kasballica Mission{/g}. However, he has never crossed the line — or, at least, he's never been caught."

languages.text: 「カイストーア・シャイガはマタレクに指定される寸前まで追い込まれている。{g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}冷戦貿易{/g}や{g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}カバルリカ・ミッション{/g}との関係も指摘されているが、彼は線を超えたことは一度もなかった。少なくとも、捕まったことはない」
languages.original_text: "Kais-torr-Shaiga is teetering on the brink of being declared a heretek. I've also come across references to his ties to the {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Cold Trade{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Kasballica Mission{/g}. However, he has never crossed the line — or, at least, he's never been caught."

traits.locale_text: 「カイストーア・シャイガはマタレクに指定される寸前まで追い込まれている。冷戦貿易やカバルリカ・ミッションとの関係も指摘されているが、彼は線を超えたことは一度もなかった。少なくとも、捕まったことはない。」
「カイストーア・シャイガはマタレクに指定される寸前まで追い込まれている。{g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}冷戦貿易{/g}や{g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}カバルリカ・ミッション{/g}との関係も指摘されているが、彼は線を超えたことは一度もなかった。少なくとも、捕まったことはない」

languages.text: «Kais-torr-Shaiga está al límite de ser declarado heretek. También he encontrado referencias a sus vínculos con el {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Comercio Frío{/g} y la {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Misión Kasballica{/g}, pero nunca se ha pasado de la raya... o, al menos, nunca se ha podido demostrar».
languages.original_text: "Kais-torr-Shaiga is teetering on the brink of being declared a heretek. I've also come across references to his ties to the {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Cold Trade{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Kasballica Mission{/g}. However, he has never crossed the line — or, at least, he's never been caught."

traits.locale_text: «Kais-torr-Shaiga está al límite de ser declarado heretek. También he encontrado referencias a sus vínculos con el {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Comercio Frío{/g} y la {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Misión Kasballica{/g}, pero nunca se ha pasado de la raya... o, al menos, nunca se ha podido demostrar».

languages.text: “凯斯-托尔-夏迦游走在被判定为异端信徒的边缘。我还查到过记录，说他与{g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}冷市贸易{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}卡斯巴利卡犯罪集团{/g}有牵连。不过，他从未越过那条线——至少从未被逮住过。”
languages.original_text: "Kais-torr-Shaiga is teetering on the brink of being declared a heretek. I've also come across references to his ties to the {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Cold Trade{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Kasballica Mission{/g}. However, he has never crossed the line — or, at least, he's never been caught."

traits.locale_text: “凯斯-托尔-夏迦游走在被判定为异端信徒的边缘。我还查到过记录，说他与{g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}冷市贸易{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}卡斯巴利卡犯罪集团{/g}有牵连。不过，他从未越过那条线——至少从未被逮住过。”

languages.text: "Kais-torr-Shaiga läuft Gefahr, zum Häretekt erklärt zu werden. Außerdem scheint er Verbindungen zum {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Kalthandel{/g} und der {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Kasballica-Mission{/g} zu unterhalten. Allerdings hat er nie die rote Linie übertreten ... oder wurde noch nie dabei erwischt."
languages.original_text: "Kais-torr-Shaiga is teetering on the brink of being declared a heretek. I've also come across references to his ties to the {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Cold Trade{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Kasballica Mission{/g}. However, he has never crossed the line — or, at least, he's never been caught."

traits.locale_text: "Kais-torr-Shaiga läuft Gefahr, zum Häretekt erklärt zu werden. Außerdem scheint er Verbindungen zum {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Kalthandel{/g} und der {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Kasballica-Mission{/g} zu unterhalten. Allerdings hat er nie die rote Linie übertreten ... oder wurde noch nie dabei erwischt."

languages.text: "Kais-torr-Shaiga, tekâfir ilan edilmenin eşiğinde. Ayrıca {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Soğuk Ticaret{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Kasballica Misyonu{/g} ile bağlarına dair referanslara rastladım. Ancak çizgiyi asla aşmamış ya da en azından hiç yakalanmamış."
languages.original_text: "Kais-torr-Shaiga is teetering on the brink of being declared a heretek. I've also come across references to his ties to the {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Cold Trade{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Kasballica Mission{/g}. However, he has never crossed the line — or, at least, he's never been caught."

traits.locale_text: "Kais-torr-Shaiga, tekâfir ilan edilmenin eşiğinde. Ayrıca {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Soğuk Ticaret{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Kasballica Misyonu{/g} ile bağlarına dair referanslara rastladım. Ancak çizgiyi asla aşmamış ya da en azından hiç yakalanmamış."

languages.text: « Kais-torr-Shaiga est sur le point d'être déclaré hérétek. J'ai aussi appris qu'il a des liens avec le {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Commerce Froid{/g} et la {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Mission de la Kasballica{/g}. Toutefois, il n'a jamais dépassé les bornes. Du moins, il ne s'est jamais fait prendre. »
languages.original_text: "Kais-torr-Shaiga is teetering on the brink of being declared a heretek. I've also come across references to his ties to the {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Cold Trade{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Kasballica Mission{/g}. However, he has never crossed the line — or, at least, he's never been caught."

traits.locale_text: « Kais-torr-Shaiga est sur le point d'être déclaré hérétek. J'ai aussi appris qu'il a des liens avec le {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Commerce Froid{/g} et la {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Mission de la Kasballica{/g}. Toutefois, il n'a jamais dépassé les bornes. Du moins, il ne s'est jamais fait prendre. »
